## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `chore` — maintenance / CI / deps
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` — code restructure, no behaviour change
- [ ] `test` — test additions or fixes
- [ ] `security` — security-relevant change

Closes #

## Testing

- [ ] `pytest tests/ -v` passes locally
- [ ] New tests added for new behaviour
- [ ] Existing tests updated if interfaces changed

## Architecture Impact

- [ ] No architectural change
- [ ] ADR added at `docs/adr/ADR-NNNN-*.md`
- [ ] Spec updated at `docs/specs/`

## Security Checklist

- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] No new attack surface introduced (or documented if yes)
- [ ] Trust-chain / identity / xattr changes reviewed

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] Docstrings updated for public API changes
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] CODEOWNERS notified (automatic via GitHub)
